calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Joseph Quinn, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, CSR Mitch Lyon, #6840. (514)
Paul K. Lee, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Portside Homeowners Association,
Plaintiff's witness Andrew Brooks is sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Betty Kwan Hing Chuck, default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Assessments/Damages: $12,698.58
Attorney's Fees: $3,695.00
Costs: $1,318.45
Administrative Charges: 280.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $17,992.03
Judgment signed in open court.
